message:
fix(proxy): exclude opengraph-image and twitter-image routes from middleware matcher

Add opengraph-image and twitter-image to the Next.js middleware matcher
negative lookahead so these dynamic OG image routes are served directly
by Next.js without being intercepted by the i18n/proxy middleware.
Without this, social crawlers (Twitter, Slack, Discord) receive a
middleware redirect instead of the rendered PNG.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
